title: spiraea rotundata
intro: Spiraea rotundata, also known as Chinese spirea, is a flowering plant native to China, characterized by its round leaves and vibrant pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Spiraea rotundata include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and dysentery. Spiraea rotundata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
